programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: A Hollywood stunt performer (Ryan Gosling) who moonlights as a wheelman discovers that a contract has been put on him after a heist gone wrong.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: A man discovers that he possesses the ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Sky Kids
programme.desc: As a pair of schoolboys sneak a look around an empty private aircraft, two criminals take off with the kids still inside. Upon discovering the men are dangerous gangsters, the horrified lads inadvertently become embroiled in the mobsters's scheme.

programme.title: Next Goal Wins
programme.desc: With the 2014 World Cup fast approaching, Dutch football coach Thomas Rongen is hired to lead the famously pitiful national team of American Samoa. But despite the odds, can Rongen pave the way to the island’s first ever victory on the world stage?

programme.title: Super
programme.desc: After his wife falls under the influence of a drug dealer, an everyday guy transforms himself into Crimson Bolt, a superhero with the best intentions, but lacking in heroic skills.

programme.title: Scoop
programme.desc: An American journalism student in London scoops a big story, and begins an affair with an aristocrat as the incident unfurls.

programme.title: The Very Excellent Mr. Dundee
programme.desc: Paul Hogan, a retired actor who is constantly overshadowed by his character Crocodile Dundee, is reluctantly thrust back into the spotlight as he attempts to restore his sullied reputation on the eve of being awarded a knighthood by the Queen of England.

programme.title: The Cut Throats
programme.desc: A captain hand-picks half a dozen American soldiers for a desperate mission in Germany, to get possession of vital WW2 plans - but he keeps another secret up his sleeve.

programme.title: Emmanuelle In Soho
programme.desc: Sultry Emmanuelle is determined to do whatever it takes to be the sensation of Soho's strip clubs - even if it means signing up with London's sleaziest agent! Red hot and blue!

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two fishermen pick up a psychopathic escaped convict who tells them that he intends to murder them when the ride is over.

programme.title: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Peter Sellers and Elke Sommer star in this successful sequel to The Pink Panther in which Inspector Clouseau tries to prove a beautiful parlor maid is innocent of killing her chauffer lover.

programme.title: Outlaws
programme.desc: In this exhilarating action epic an impassioned group of men and women make the decision to risk it all for family, faith and country. Outlaws reveals the once hidden true story of the 1920's Cristeros War. What price would you pay for freedom?

programme.title: The Lone Ranger: A Message from Abe
programme.desc: The Ranger and Tonto visit apparently reformed ex-con Phil Beach on Lincoln's Birthday.

programme.title: The Man From Utah
programme.desc: In a horse-riding rodeo contest bad guys want John Weston to lose. When he doesn't go along they add some insurance: a poisoned needle just under his saddle. Starring: John Wayne, Polly Ann Young, Anita Campillo

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Three wagonloads of attractive "mail-order" brides, misled about their destination, get help from Gil Favor's drovers.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: A wealthy rancher tries to adopt Gil Favor's two daughters, who come all the way from Philadelphia to see their father.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Gil Favor and Pete Nolan join the U.S. Army -- temporarily - to negotiate a trade of six Army deserters for one Crow Indian chief.

programme.title: Cyborg
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this adrenaline-charged sci-fi thriller as Gibson Rickenbacker, the future's most fearsome warrior. In the wake of a plague, Rickenbacker must rescue the only person who can develop a vaccine and save civilization.

programme.title: Karate Warrior
programme.desc: Anthony Scott heads to Manilla for a chance to re-connect with his father but, almost as soon as he lands, Anthony swiftly finds himself on the wrong side of local gangster Quino... who also happens to be a bad-ass Karate champion.

programme.title: Pumping Iron
programme.desc: Scripted documentary following Arnold Schwarzenegger as he attempts to defend his bodybuilding title against several competitors.

programme.title: Rain
programme.desc: Set in 1968, a German Shepherd enrolled by his family in a training program that will send him to serve American soldiers in Vietnam. Even when Rain is wounded, he saves many, and bonds with a soldier who learns much from this very special dog.

programme.title: Open Water: Open Water
programme.desc: When a couple is stranded while scuba diving, they soon realize they are in the middle of shark-infested waters in this intense, critically acclaimed thriller.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: An innocent girl is kidnapped and held hostage for two years causing her to develop multiple personalities and making her the number one suspect when her English professor is brutally murdered.

programme.title: Full Exposure: The Sex Tapes Scandal
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl (Vanessa Williams) who has been secretly videotaping her rich clients is murdered.

programme.title: Alien Reign Of Man
programme.desc: Stranded on a distant planet, a team must fight aliens and activate a machine meant to restore Earth to a time before its downfall.

programme.title: Earth to Echo
programme.desc: After receiving a bizarre series of encrypted messages, a group of kids embark on an adventure with an alien who needs their help.

programme.title: Wizards Of The Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: When evil screams throughout the world. When all the galaxies converge. When all that's fair and fine seems lost. A Hero will emerge.

programme.title: Time Toys
programme.desc: A group of kids stumble upon a chest full of toys from the future. The discovery takes them on an adventure using their new-found toys to save their neighbourhood and the world from a maniacal madman. A fun, futuristic adventure for all the family.

programme.title: A Boy Called Sailboat
programme.desc: A small family finds hope in their extraordinary son named Sailboat when a personal gesture awakens a global desire.

programme.title: Kids From Planet 62F
programme.desc: Four friends find an object with special powers that belongs to two alien kids from the planet 62F. Now they must race to get it back to its rightful owners, but NASA are on their tail and they will stop at nothing to get their hands on it.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 8
programme.desc: The Falfurrias checkpoint in South Texas cracks down on drug and human traffickers. Their inspections are so effective that they often force migrants and drug smugglers to hike forty miles around the checkpoint to avoid detection

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 9
programme.desc: Broward County law enforcement and fire rescue tackle a daily onslaught of cases tied to the dangerous new synthetic drug Flakka . And a Ft Lauderdale Flakka addict named Glenn undertakes what may be his last chance at recovery.

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 10
programme.desc: When night falls on the Rio Grande comes to life with drug smugglers. Border Patrol counters by dispatching highly-trained Special Operations units, with agents drawn from the elite tactical unit BORTAC and the Mobile Response Team (MRT).

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 11
programme.desc: Border Patrol agents race to apprehend illegal crossers working under the cover of night in a dangerous portion of the Rio Grande. And South Florida law enforcement tackles the heroin epidemic that is sweeping America

programme.title: Drug Wars: Episode 12
programme.desc: Border Patrol Agents in Arizona chase an undocumented alien who’s jumped the border fence and crossed into the US illegally.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: In Northern BC, a challenging modern log home has Beat and his crew risking life and limb. Meantime, Joel and Bryan Sr. take a chance on hiring an eccentric perfectionist to carve a life-size statue on a tight deadline.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Active Duty
programme.desc: In California, Joel is under the gun, with a job that’s behind schedule before it even begins. Meanwhile, Beat marshals the troops to finish a mega project on the verge of shipping out.

programme.title: Timber Kings: Make a Mark
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. makes a mark in the self-proclaimed log home capital of the world. Back at the yard, Andre tries to control Peter when his pent-up creativity goes in overdrive.

programme.title: Mirrors
programme.desc: From the director of The Hills Have Eyes comes the terrifying story of troubled ex-cop who must save his family from an unspeakable evil that is using mirrors as a gateway into their home.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Blind Justice
programme.desc: When an airline pilot is framed for drug smuggling, a killer comes to his home to silence him... and the pilot's blind wife (Honor Blackman) is the only witness.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Strange Partners
programme.desc: A wealthy man uses extortion and a trained attack dog to force Peter to kill his partner and make it look like a heart attack.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Present Tense
programme.desc: Colonel March's niece, a believer in spiritualism, hears her dead husband's voice and becomes convinced he has returned as a ghost; but has he?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: At Night All Cats Are Gray
programme.desc: A lady claims an odd man is following her and fears for her life. She’s later found murdered...in mismatched color, a telling clue for the inspector.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Case of the Kidnapped Poodle
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a valuable stolen diamond as well as the kidnapping of a little boy's poodle; he thinks both incidents may be connected.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Invisible Knife
programme.desc: March must solve the mystery of how a man could be stabbed to death by an invisible knife, while attempting to summon The Devil during a black rite.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Catherine is forced to revisit her first solo case as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Robbins turns detective to solve the mysterious deaths of four apparently unrelated deaths

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to the murder of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team investigates when two nuns find a woman crucified in the rafters of their church.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the mysterious disappearance of two boys.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Twins who are unaware of each other's existence are murdered.

programme.title: Scorpion: Crossroads
programme.desc: To protect a key witness who is en route to testifying against a deadly drug cartel, Team Scorpion takes her on the run, with the cartel hot on their heels.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: Walter finally learns Cabe's long-kept secret regarding the Baghdad mission, and it threatens to tear Team Scorpion apart forever.

programme.title: Scorpion: Postcards From the Edge
programme.desc: Scorpion, torn apart and uncertain about their future as a team, must come together for their most important mission yet to save Walter's life as his car teeters on the side of a cliff.

programme.title: Scorpion: Satellite Of Love
programme.desc: The new Director of Homeland Security reunites the team when a nuclear powered Russian satellite is knocked out of orbit and must be diverted before it detonates over Southern California.

programme.title: Scorpion: Cuba Libre
programme.desc: Team Scorpion heads to Cuba when a woman from Cabe's past pleads for him to help catch a Serbian war criminal.

programme.title: Scorpion: Fish Filet
programme.desc: In order to save the lives of three judges, Sylvester goes undercover in federal prison but Team Scorpion must break him out when his life is threatened. Kevin Weisman guest stars.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Monster
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine. Andy and Swarek work together to find the accomplice of a dyed blue bank robber

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together under Swarek’s expert tutelage in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Best Laid Plans
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident. While Andy deals with a woman pinned in her car, the other officers must track and apprehend the fugitive

programme.title: Rookie Blue: A Little Faith
programme.desc: When Traci and Andy are sent out on an undercover training exercise, they stumble upon a young woman who is about to die of an overdose. Meanwhile, Dov finds himself on a “ride-along” with a drug dealer and old friend of his deceased brother

programme.title: Rookie Blue: On The Double
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer. Meanwhile, Swarek’s off the grid, trying to get information out of former crime enforcer Jamie Brennan

programme.title: Rookie Blue: God’s Good Grace
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated by Jamie Brennan in the basement of a Pickering farmhouse, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: Bishop's most formidable foe kidnaps the love of his life in order to make him complete three impossible assassinations and make them look like accidents.

programme.title: Homefront
programme.desc: A former DEA agent (Jason Statham) returns to action to save his daughter and his new town from a drug-dealing sociopath (James Franco).

programme.title: Safe
programme.desc: A young girl whose memory holds a priceless numerical code, finds herself pursued. Coming to her aid is an ex-cage fighter whose life was destroyed by the gangsters on Mei's trail.

programme.title: The Ship That Died of Shame
programme.desc: A trio of ex-servicemen begin smuggling innocuous black market items into post-war Britain, but through greed they graduate to more sinister cargo, assisting in the escape of child murderer.

programme.title: Nurse on Wheels
programme.desc: A young nurse settles in a small English country village with her nutty mother. While tending the accident-prone country folk as the district nurse, she begins to charm a rich farmer.

programme.title: Pink String and Sealing Wax
programme.desc: A tavern keeper's wife who is dissatisfied with her life uses a young admirer to murder her husband.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: While in Afghanistan, Kessler is kidnapped by the Taliban.

programme.title: The Border
programme.desc: Zoe helps a Chinese Olympic athlete defect to Canada.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: While Grissom leads a group of college students on a tour of CSI, the dead speak while the CSIs investigate, each narrating their own case

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate first-hand the behind-the-scenes action of Cirque du Soleil in order to determine what may have contributed to a young dancer's untimely death.

programme.title: NEW CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom is fascinated when every detail of a miniature is identical to that of a real crime scene, and he goes about trying to solve the case using the clues provided.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet. But personal feelings get thrust aside when a bomb explodes in a downtown parking garage

programme.title: Mirror Images II
programme.desc: A woman (Shannon Whirry) hires a private investigator (Tom Reilly) to probe the mysterious death of her identical twin.

programme.title: Red Shoe Diaries
programme.desc: Claire cannot forget the beautiful stranger she let slip away after three New Year's Eves spent together. On the fourth New Year's Eve, she is alone and as the bells ring in the new year, she runs out into the street looking for the man of her dreams.

programme.title: JAG: The Boast
programme.desc: When an unwitting corporal boasts to a reporter that he killed an Iraqi prisoner of war, facts begin to emerge that could convict him despite his later claim that he was only lying toi mpress.

programme.title: JAG: Pulse Rate
programme.desc: Harm and Mac go aboard the USS Gillcrist to determine if a seaman’s fatal accident during a routine repair was the result of a co-worker’s dereliction of duty or worse.

programme.title: JAG: Good Intentions
programme.desc: Mac defends a petty officer and former alcoholic accused of a brutal murder after a drinking binge which renders him useless in remembering details that could help him. Roberts is entangled in the case of a Navy Commander accused of embezzling funds.

programme.title: JAG: People vs SECNAV
programme.desc: After an incident in Iraq claims the lives of innocent civilians, SecNav is brought up on charges of war crimes in International Court, and Harm and Mac must defend him. Meanwhile, during a trip to the arcade, little A.J. goes missing.

programme.title: JAG: Coming Home
programme.desc: A marine’s killing in Iraq has ramifications for JAG stateside as Harm helps the soldier’s family with a media onslaught, and Bud and Mac investigate the failure of his flack vest.

programme.title: JAG: Fighting Words
programme.desc: A general’s comments about Islam during a church service pit Harm and Mac against each other as a court-martial hearing examines whether those remarks were a danger to national security.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A shooter inside a historic arena leaves Sam questioning his place on the team.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A wave of terrorist bombs shuts down the city, pushing Team One to the limit and putting one of their own on the line.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU must rescue a young woman after she’s been abducted by a delusional man who insists she is his missing daughter.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: The SRU are called in to contain a riot at a maximum-security prison and begin to suspect it’s all a cover for a daring prison break.

programme.title: Flashpoint
programme.desc: A bitter child custody battle sparks a critical incident and the SRU must use a risky “rolling roadblock” maneuver to rescue the children.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Colin gets bossy playing the "Hollywood Director" and there's a time-bending game of "Forward Rewind". Guest performers are Olympic synchronised swimmers Mary Killman & Mariya Koroleva. (S1, E05)

programme.desc: Coach Colin tries to teach pro-wrestler Wayne some new moves in "Forward Rewind". An emotional goodbye scene between father Ryan and son Colin quickly turns hilarious in "Whose Line". (S2, E24)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: 'Film & Theater Styles'; 'World's Worst'; 'Helping Hands'; 'American Musical'; 'Song Styles'.

programme.desc: Colin's farm gets weird & wild in "Hollywood Director", and we hear some inappropriate things to say at a wedding in "Scenes From A Hat". Guest is reality star Jack Osbourne. (S2, E10)

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performer Jonathan Mangum.

programme.title: Matlock: The Ex
programme.desc: Ben Matlock finds himself in an awkward situation when he joins Julie March in Baltimore to help her defend an old friend accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Clown
programme.desc: Matlock holds the last ray of hope for a veteran circus clown, Homer Fleming, accused of murdering his partner during a performance.

programme.title: Matlock: The Star
programme.desc: Ben Matlock uncovers plots within a plot when Noel Bishop, the wunderkind director of horror films, is accused of murdering motion picture star Catherine McKay as the cameras roll.

programme.title: Matlock: The Con Man
programme.desc: Ben Matlock has serious doubts about a code of ethics among con artists which is never supposed to include murder.

programme.title: Matlock: The Prisoner (Part 1)
programme.desc: Ben Matlock accepts the most dangerous case of his career when he agrees to defend an inmate accused of murder – before a kangaroo court in a riot-torn prison.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison dons the fedora for another Indy movie but would George Lucas’s failed marriage spell Doom for the script? And when Sean Connery joins the franchise in the third installment will there be enough screen for two leading men?

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison leverages his star power to gain director approval as he takes on the role of Jack Ryan in Tom Clancy’s Patriot Games. But Harrison’s outsized control behind the camera threatens to have an effect on performances in front of it.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison’s role as a doctor on the run in The Fugitive is mirrored behind the scenes with a runaway production marred by grueling shoots, crew firings, an elusive third act and a star playing a doctor in need of real life medical attention.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harrison Ford
programme.desc: Harrison reaches new heights in Air Force One - an aircraft so secretive it takes intel from a sitting US President to help make the film. Another movie threatens a titanic problem that may keep Air Force one from an on time departure.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: A director known for working with kids goes to great lengths to make children’s dreams come true, but the production hits a snag when taking flight proves more difficult than expected.

programme.title: Icons Unearthed: Harry Potter
programme.desc: The team races to the finish line on the first film, while kicking off the second. But just as everything starts to come together, the team loses a family member.

programme.title: Until the End of the World - Director's Cut
programme.desc: In 1999, Claire's life is forever changed after she survives a car crash. She rescues Sam and starts traveling around the world with him. Writer Eugene follows them and writes their story, as a way of recording dreams is being invented.

programme.title: Ice and the Sky
programme.desc: A chronicle of the professional and emotional journey of scientist Claude Lorius, who left in 1957 to study the Antarctic ice and is regarded as the first person to discover global warming and prove its existence.

programme.title: Tokyo-Ga
programme.desc: Moved by the work of director Yasujirô Ozu, Wim Wenders travels to Japan in search of the Tokyo seen in Ozu's films.

programme.title: 60 days in Jail

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The kidnapper threatens to kill Barbara's (Vera Miles) child if she doesn't deliver the ransom.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: An escaped convict (Clu Gulager) flees a corrupt sheriff's domain in Ironside's van; guests Louise Latham, Steve Forrest.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: Two are murdered during negotiations in Scandinavia for the release of U.S. prisoners from China.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: A bar patron identifies Brown as the killer of a petty gangster.

programme.title: Ironside
programme.desc: The rebellious son of a Mexican-American Medal of Honor winner is suspected by police of seditious behavior.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Rapist
programme.desc: When Lacey goes out on maternity leave, Cagney's is given a temporary partner temporary partner, Sara Jones. Jones becomes obsessed with a rape investigation and increasingly frustrated with the length of time it is taking to arrest the suspect.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Act Of Conscience
programme.desc: While Lacey is on maternity leave, Cagney is assigned a controversial new partner who's past of turning in other cops who have participated in illegal activity makes the rest of the 14th precinct question how long he will stay among them.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: D.W.I.
programme.desc: Cagney (Sharon Gless) goes undercover with Det. Jonah Newman (guest star Dan Shor) to investigate a series of disappearing Santa Clauses and issues with music rights. Also starring Tyne Daly as Mary Beth Lacey and Al Waxman as Lt. Bert Samuels.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: The Gimp
programme.desc: While investigating a series of muggings of disabled persons, Cagney (Sharon Gless) gets a first-hand look at the problems they face and becomes romantically involved with a man (guest star James Stacy) who is handicapped and advocating for change.

programme.title: Cagney & Lacey: Family Connections
programme.desc: Cagney has to rush to Lacey's side at the hospital, hoping that she can make it before the baby is delivered. Being around Lacey and her family makes Cagney have second thoughts about her life as a singleton. Cagney's father has a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Butch Mario & The Luigi Kid
programme.desc: While trying to rescue the Princess from an abandoned mine, the Mario brothers find themselves running from Sheriff Mouser and his minions who are after the large reward Koopa has promised for their capture.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Toadally Magical Adventure/Misadventures In Babysitting
programme.desc: Toad is toadally infatuated with the Wizard King's new magic wand. / The Mario Brothers are warped into a Brooklyn apartment and are appointed as babysitters.

programme.title: Super Mario Brothers Super Show: Rolling Down The River
programme.desc: The Marios and Toad are trying to save Princess from Koopa's riverboat. When their plan goes horribly wrong, Toad gets caught and the Marios barely escape with their lives.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Sneaking Lying Cheating Giant Ninja Koopas/Reptiles In The Rose Garden
programme.desc: King Koopa uses a Magic Wand to turn Cheatsy, Bigmouth, Bully, and Kooky into giants./Kootie Pie demands that she be given Real World America as a gift.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros 3 Adventures: Dadzilla/Tag Team Trouble
programme.desc: Kootie Pie and Big Mouth are convinced they are much too beautiful to be adopted!/Toad thinks he has lost the million gold coins the Princess had him deliver.

programme.desc: Following the departure of two contestants from the competition, those remaining are challenged to create Indian-inspired meals, with the winning team earning a day of pampering at a luxurious spa.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay puts aspiring chefs through tough challenges. The teams are challenged to a blind taste test. Dinner service is held in honour of a group of decorated firefighters.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are challenged to create their own amuse bouches, with the winners enjoying a helicopter ride to a luxury location and the losers preparing coconuts for dinner service.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The teams are tasked with creating mouthwatering steak dishes in a bid to impress Gordon and the owner of a renowned steak restaurant.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen USA
programme.desc: The remaining chefs cater for 40 `glampers' before a hectic dinner service which leads to a difficult decision for the chefs and Gordon himself. Someone will have to pay the ultimate price and be forced to leave the competition at this late stage.

programme.title: The Game: The Busted Episode
programme.desc: Tasha attempts to salvage her friendship with Pookieafter it is revealed she has been cheating on him with Rick. Meanwhile, Jason and Chardonnay have it out over her involvement in Tasha's love triangle.

programme.title: The Game: I'm Not Kelly Pitts
programme.desc: Chardonnay must hide her friendship with Tasha from Jason while simultaneously dealing with the re-emergance of his football persona.

programme.title: The Game: I Love Luke...AHH!
programme.desc: Blue and Keira get into a conflict over what his role is when he breaks up a moment between her and her co-star. Meanwhile, Malik is devastated when he learns his past is preventing him from advancing in his future.

programme.title: The Game: Photo-Shoot Fresh
programme.desc: Can Chardonnay walk down the aisle without a hitch? Will Tasha find out who her baby's father is? Will Blue and Keira work out their problems (again)? All this and more on the season 7 finale.

programme.title: Run's House: Hawaiian Vacation
programme.desc: Rev forgets to tell Uncle Russell that JoJo will miss work for a family vacation. Angela and Vanessa try to help cousin Jessica meet a guy. Russy is afraid to go surfing after he loses his ancient shark tooth necklace.

programme.title: Run's House: Run's Big House
programme.desc: Rev and family rally around JoJo after he gets busted for possession of marijuana.

programme.title: Run's House: The Secret of My Excess
programme.desc: The boys' wastefulness triggers a cleaning rampage by Rev. Meanwhile, Russy gets obsessive about training for his blue belt in karate.

programme.title: Run's House: Blog Wild
programme.desc: Rev tricks the girls into coming back East for work so that he and Justine can spend time with them. JoJo helps Diggy bring more traffic to his blog.

programme.title: Run's House: Tapper's Delight
programme.desc: Vanessa and Angela nurture Russy's new passion: tap dancing. Diggy plays his sisters into getting him a mini-fridge for his bedroom. Rev tries to babyproof the house.

programme.title: Run's House: An Office He Can't Refuse
programme.desc: Rev tries to become an office worker at the remarkable Global Grind. Diggy's clean freak behavior borders on germaphobia.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 1
programme.desc: Part 1. The upper floors of Wentworth House are a maze of corridors and rooms and the team have one night to investigate as many as possible. With one whistling spirit, groans and loud noises the team are shaken to their core.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Wentworth Woodhouse Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. The underbelly of this great house is a sharp contrast to its upper grandeur. Some members of the team are forced to run while other are lost in the labyrinth of tunnels and passageways pursued by something unnatural.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Oakwell House
programme.desc: The team investigate Oakwell House near Leeds, which was built by ancestors of Fred Batt. In 1684, William Batt returned unexpectedly from a trip to London but vanished leaving a bloody footprint. A demon dog has been seen in the grounds.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Knottingley Town Hall
programme.desc: This location is said to be overflowing with paranormal activity, which doesn’t disappoint.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Capesthorne Hall
programme.desc: The beauty of this magnificent Cheshire country house hides the horror that lies in its corridors. As well a poltergeist activity the team manage to catch some of their best evidence to date and even our sceptic hears noises.

programme.title: Most Haunted: 30 East Drive_PT1
programme.desc: 30 East Drive is said to house the most violent poltergeist in the world. The team go head first into what becomes their toughest challenge yet. As soon as they enter the property something is waiting and wants to be known.

programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to a Hollywood auction and face a new competitor with a seemingly endless cash flow. After they uncover a triple barrel shotgun and an antique camel saddle, Allen confronts an old childhood fear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Without a Chute
programme.desc: After a tough auction, things get worse when the shop's landlord wants to talk to the guys. Ton tries to negotiate with him while Allen has to put an experimental powered parachute to the test to save the day's profits.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Cashville, Tennessee
programme.desc: Ton and Allen hit the road for Nashville, where they rumble with a band of tough, high-bidding bikers. The day explodes when the guys discover a 37 millimeter anti-tank gun and a cowboy's rodeo saddle.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Carolyn Goes Topless
programme.desc: A friendly competition with former employee Carolyn turns into a vicious battle for a 1968 Corvette Stingray, giving Carolyn the last laugh. Allen tests his Ninja skills with an antique sickle weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Little-Ton Jones
programme.desc: Allen & Ton try to get the inside scoop on their competition by chatting up local auction buyers. The guys find some heavy gold-mining machinery from the 1950s & an amateur rocket that can travel faster than the speed of sound!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Win Lose or Joust
programme.desc: Ton and Allen race back from an auction to purchase a rare comic valued at over $100,000. The guys uncover a Samurai sword used for ritual suicide and Allen lives out his childhood fantasy of becoming knight.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gone in 20 Seconds

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Don't Taze Me Bro

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Finale Special: Check Up With Dr. Drew

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Curveball

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Intensive care

programme.title: NEW People's Court
programme.desc: Alain has been brought to court for not finishing a custom outfit he says is because he was hospitalized.

programme.title: NEW People's Court

programme.title: Arthur: Cast Away/The Great Sock Mystery
programme.desc: Arthur is thrilled when Dad invites him to go fly-fishing for the weekend. But a change in plans forces them to include D.W. Find out once and for all where socks disappear to when Baby Kate and Pal team up to solve the great sock mystery.

programme.title: Arthur: Binky's Music Madness/Brain Freeze
programme.desc: Everyone loves the Bang on a Can All-Stars, a funky experimental music group that's touring around Elwood City. Everyone that is, except Binky. A new ice cream shop has just opened up across the block. Will Brain's shop be able to survive?

programme.title: Arthur: The Cherry Tree/Matchmaker Matchbreaker
programme.desc: Muffy wants a Bouncy Castle at her party, but when her favorite cherry tree is cut down to make room for it, she starts to have regrets. Francine and Muffy scheme to set up their older siblings Chip and Catherine, but plans go awry.

programme.title: Arthur: Dear Adil/Bitzi's Break-Up
programme.desc: Arthur is worried that his letters to his new Turkish pen pal, Adil, will be boring. After all, how can Elwood City compare to Arthur's fantastical ideas about Turkey? Bitzi is breaking up with her boyfriend, and Buster is really sad.

programme.title: Arthur: The Agent of Change/D.W. Unties the Knot
programme.desc: The latest animated hit movie about a boy and his truck has left Muffy and Francine disappointed. Why doesn't there seem to be any cool female characters on screen? After watching "The Wedding Channel," D.W. wants to get married!

programme.title: Arthur: D.W. Tale Spins/Prunella Gets It Twice
programme.desc: What happens when you combine Greek Mythology with D.W.'s imagination? Then, getting two Polly Locket dolls almost ruins Prunella's birthday party. That, and Francine's bad mood--why, she wouldn't even sing the Happy Birthday song!

programme.title: Arthur: The Blackout/Mei Lin Takes a Stand
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Elwood City, and a total blackout leaves its residents without electricity! Will Arthur and DW survive without AC and TV? Binky's baby sister Mei-Lin isn't keen on learning to walk and would rather stick to crawling.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Babysits/Arthur's Cousin Catastrophe
programme.desc: You think running a marathon is hard? Try babysitting for the Terrible Tibble Twins. Next, Arthur's family is hosting the once-a-year-is-more-than-enough family reunion. But a major thunderstorm turns this into a reunion to remember.

programme.title: Arthur: The Butler Did...What?/The Trouble with Trophies
programme.desc: Bailey is missing! Muffy discovers a series of clues and is left wondering, who exactly IS Bailey? Then, everyone loves getting trophies, right? It turns out that Fern could not care less about them.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Easy as ABC
programme.desc: When Baby Bop uses the caboose mailbox to deliver a special invitation to her tea party, she discovers that no one can read her handwriting. Barney and his friends find creative ways to help her learn her ABCs!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: All About Me
programme.desc: Baby Bop and BJ have fun playing ball in the park. Barney helps them learn that trying something new can also be fun. Baby Bop prepares a special picnic for BJ, but much to his surprise, it consists mostly of her favorite foods.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Red, Yellow and Blue!
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bienvenido, Barney!
programme.desc: Baby Bop's friend Monty the butterfly passes through the park with a flock of friends on their way to Mexico. When Monty gets left behind by his insect friends and family, Barney takes everyone on a visit to Mexico.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Rat King

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles at the Earth's Core
programme.desc: The Turtles venture down to the Earth's core and discover a lost prehistoric world complete with dinosaurs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): April Foolish

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Attack of the Big MACC

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Take Me to Your Leader

programme.desc: Leonardo becomes a little soft in the shell after he is knocked on the head. He thinks he is D' Artagan and that the other Turtles are the Three Musketeers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles, Turtles, Everywhere!
programme.desc: The city's new state-of-the-art garbage disposal system's main computer DUMP 1000 is programmed by Shredder to seize the Turtles but starts scooping up every turtle in sight.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash and the gang arrive in a town besieged by apparent copycat crimes mimicking a legendary master thief. The town’s hopes lie with these young Trainers...how can they stop this criminal duo and their Meowth accomplice?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When our heroes return an unhappy Snubbull to its wealthy Trainer, it sparks off a series of events that will change the Pokémon’s life forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Professor Oak’s errand to deliver the mysterious GS Ball to a Poké Ball expert is interrupted when a Quagsire with an eye for round objects steals the GS Ball for a nocturnal ritual…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: It’s finally time for Ash’s first Johto League Gym battle, and he’s feeling confident. But Falkner’s Flying-type Pokémon prove to be tough competition! Can Ash take the win—and his first Gym badge?

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.title: Teletubbies

programme.desc: A distraught mother offers the town of Dry Rock $300,000 if it will clear her dead son's name of murder and robbery.

programme.desc: Rowdy Yates, sent to collect payment on 300 head of cattle, meets a little old "grandma" with larceny on her mind.

programme.desc: A man incriminates himself when he falls in cement while trying to transport a dead body.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Elena
programme.desc: Double-agent Elena Del Barra is acting bizarrely, sending a microfilm of defense secrets from her own country. Rollin is sent in to investigate and return the microfilm without its theft ever being detected.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Zubrovnik's Ghost
programme.desc: The wife of a deceased scientist, Kurt Zubrovnik, is being pressured by Eastern forces to work for them.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton-Geons & Dragons
programme.desc: While Ton soups up their new truck, Allen heads to an auction solo and encounters Carolyn and CJ. There he discovers LARP weaponry, a sword collection, and falconry gear, before Ton reveals their new ride: Betty.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching!
programme.desc: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance after nearly getting shut out in the small town of Palmer. They uncover a motorized railroad maintenance car from the 1960's and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Diesel Digs
programme.desc: The guys head to the industrial hub of LA to score some heavy machinery and unearth a 1981 Bobcat 743 Frontloader, one of the first powered by a diesel engine and a trench-defending WWI German Sturmtrupp helmet bashing mace.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Sis Ducks Out
programme.desc: Big Sis drops some bad news as the guys clash with Carolyn over a carnival unit at an auction in Long Beach. Ton and Allen unearth a Native American tomahawk, a dunk tank and a rare gun that can fire three shots at once.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Strat'ed for Cash
programme.desc: On a limited budget in the historic L.A. neighborhood of West Adams, Allen and Ton still win three lockers and find a Maui Blue Fender Stratocaster and a 1930s Schwinn bike.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Intensive care
programme.desc: Kailyn finds an apartment through a non-profit organization and moves out without telling her mum. After a huge fight where Kieffer pushed her, Jenelle decides to file domestic charges.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: No looking back
programme.desc: Leah gets the results of Ali's MRI and is relieved to find out there's nothing wrong with her brain. Meanwhile, Jenelle is spending time with Jace and finally at peace with her mum.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Kailyn adjusts to being alone for the holidays, Jenelle regrets filing charges against Kieffer and Leah works to make the holidays special for the twins.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Lean on me
programme.desc: Leah and Corey take Ali to the geneticist and get some troubling news. Jenelle and Kieffer face court; Chelsea learns a friend is pregnant, and Jo is not around for Issac.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Breaking Point
programme.desc: Kieffer gets upset that Jenelle hung out with an old boyfriend while he was in jail and Leah gets the results of Ali's genetic testing. Also Kailyn gets into a car accident.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Making moves
programme.desc: Jenelle and Barb start fighting again so she decides to move in with her friend Tori. Meanwhile, Jo confronts Kailyn about filing for child support. Corey and Leah get some alarming news.

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated With My Daughter's Girlfriend
programme.desc: These women are desperate to hear MAURY say the words “YOU ARE THE FATHER!” But these men want to hear him say “YOU ARE NOT THE FATHER!” But only MAURY’s got the results they’re looking for!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Instead of chocolates and dinners, these guests are being cheated on and dumped. Love may be blind, but lie detector tests and hidden cameras will reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'm Back for My 3rd Test... I'll Prove I'm Not the Father Again
programme.desc: Chris cheated and impregnated Lakin's neighbor. He denies he fathered Lakin’s baby. Then, John’s back for a 3rd DNA test. Can Jade prove that he’s the father or is her record 0-3?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Teen DNA... I'll Prove You Got Me Pregnant at 15!
programme.desc: Keith is terrified that Chyna cheated and their daughter may not be his. Could Keith’s best friend be the real father? Will the DNA results quash Omar's denials about fathering Jennifer’s child?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Man Sleeping With My Teen Nephew?
programme.desc: Nikki won’t marry Will until he proves he’s faithful, but what did our hidden cameras confirm? Then, teens Jessica and Sean are days away from marriage. Could Sean be cheating with her best friend?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Slept With Your Fiance... I'll Prove My 2 Kids Are His!
programme.desc: Did Selina's fiancé Thomas secretly father a baby with his ex-girlfriend and has Victoria been cheating on Brian? They'll take the test to find out on Maury today!

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Manchurian Candidates
programme.desc: Several prominent researchers in the field provide a short history of Mind Control experimentation beginning with the Nazis through to the CIA's infamous MK Ultra program.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: UFOs: The Best Evidence Volume 1 - The Visitors
programme.desc: This volume of UFOs the Best Evidence focuses on The Visitors, traces UFOs throughout history, including sightings by the world’s most famous people, and an astounding collection of UFO photos and videos which seem to defy explanation and science.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: Touched
programme.desc: When Harvard psychiatrist John Mack approached filmmaker Laurel Chiten asking her to make a movie about encounters with aliens, she thought he was crazy. But after meeting some of the so-called experiencers she was intruiged.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the American Museum of Natural History, New York
programme.desc: From a dinosaur embryo that solves a murder mystery to a spacecraft catching a comet’s tail, discover the secrets inside the American Museum of Natural History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Louvre
programme.desc: From murdered kings to stolen masterpieces, discover the secrets inside the Louvre.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Palacio Real, Madrid
programme.desc: From a clock that runs on witchcraft to a 21st Century king who outfoxes a fascist, discover the secrets inside the Palacio Real.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem
programme.desc: From a scientist who recreates the crucifixion to an ancient amulet that proves Star Trek's Spock is Jewish, discover the secrets inside the Israel Museum.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MANMADE
programme.desc: When it comes to disasters, mother nature has mankind beat. However, as mankind expands, evolves and technology advances, it comes with dangerous challenges. When errors are made or unforeseen circumstances occur, the results can be devastating.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: EARTHQUAKES
programme.desc: Earthquakes happen when tectonic plates suddenly slip causing shock waves to shake the surface of the Earth. They occur on fault lines - the most active are the Ring of Fire in the Pacific Ocean and the San Andreas fault on America’s west coast.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: MEGAFLOODS
programme.desc: Water covers two thirds of the earth’s surface, and we are utterly dependent on it, but when this vital ingredient of life unleashes its fury on the planet it becomes the ultimate bringer of death.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: CONSTRUCTION
programme.desc: Bridges and tunnels have transformed the way we live, making the inaccessible easy to reach, and turning time consuming journeys into convenient commutes, but when things go wrong they can go very wrong indeed.

programme.title: Destruction Decoded: AIR, LAND AND SEA
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships, our mass transit systems, have had a profound effect on mankind, making the world smaller and more connected.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Next Stop Mars
programme.desc: It has fired our imaginations for millennia, Mars, the God of War and the source of Man's science fictional demise.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Ice Giants
programme.desc: Beyond the asteroid belt lay the ice giants, some can be seen with the naked eye, others only glimpsed once by a passing probe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Sun
programme.desc: It powers the machinery of nature; our weather, encourages and sustains life on land and at sea.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Exo Planeta
programme.desc: As scientists and astronomers peer closer at nearby stars with ever more fidelity they are discovering planets; exo planets, worlds outside our own solar system.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Edge of The Universe
programme.desc: The night sky is a time machine. The further we look out into the universe the further back in time we reach.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Astronauts
programme.desc: One hundred kilometres above the Earth’s surface lies an invisible frontier: the edge of space.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: Wild Serbia
programme.desc: Serbia, in the heart of the Balkans, is one of Europe’s little natural wonders.

programme.title: Wildest India: Western Ghats: Monsoon Mountains
programme.desc: See how the Himalayas run across 2,500km of north India.The Himalayas' highlands offer little direct refuge to humans. /Then, learn about the western Ghats. A spine of mountains that lay claim to being one of the most bio-diverse places in the world.

programme.title: Wildest India: India's Lost World
programme.desc: North-east India is an anthropological paradise; there is no other place on Earth with so many different ethnic groups. The forest are filled with mysterious tribes whose lives are dictated by the rain and the seasonal fruits of the forest.

programme.title: Wildest Middle East
programme.desc: Wildest Middle East reveals the remotest and most surprising corners of this ancient land, where you will find nothing is as it seems and where the natural world is fighting a constant battle to survive in an ever changing world.

programme.title: Meerkat Manor: Rise of the Dynasty
programme.desc: Swift, matriarch of the Whiskers welcomes her latest litter while new leader Flint Lockwood struggles for childcare.

programme.title: Wildest Indonesia
programme.desc: The island chain of Indonesia is home to more active volcanoes than any other country in the world. Yet somehow, instead of posing a threat – this volcanic activity is a source of life

programme.title: Britain's Bloodiest Dynasty: Revenge
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones explores the reign of Edward II.

programme.title: Britain's Bloodiest Dynasty: Tyranny
programme.desc: The story of Richard II, the last Plantagenet king.

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: The truth behind what really started the War of the Roses is told.

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: Dan Jones tells then story of Richard Neville, Earl of Warwick.

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: Did Richard III really kill the 'Princes in the Tower'?

programme.title: Britain's Bloody Crown
programme.desc: Dan Jones reveals the remarkable story of Henry VII's mother.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown: Punjab, India
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Big Wipe-Out
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: You Can Bet On It!
programme.desc: Kristine had a string of gambling and forgery charges before she jumped bail leaving Dog "holding the bag". Now it's time for Dog to call in some chits of his own, getting the help of trusty informants he's helped out over the years.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Fly Boy
programme.desc: Dog told him not to go, but Charles went anyway, skipping to Oregon against the terms of his bail. Now Dog has a tip that Charles plans to slip back into Honolulu. With $30,000 on the line Dog knows he can leave little to chance.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Guns & Ice
programme.desc: The following day is Dog's birthday but that won't stop him from chasing a fugitive, who is facing firearms charges. Dog doesn't relish the thought of going after an alleged gunslinger on his birthday but he's never one to avoid a challenge.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Dog and Beth have to be at the state capitol bright and early to receive an award for their fight against ice in Hawaii. Afterwards, they're inspired to start the hunt for Shanna, an alleged ice user and identity thief with $80,000 in bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: The Smackdown of Baby Lyssa
programme.desc: After meeting with the cosigner on a bond for a man named John, Dog and the Posse hatch a plan to lure him to a high rise apartment. But when night falls, their plan leaves a member of the team alone and in harm's way!

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in. To complicate matters, this fugitive lives in a tightly-knit community where good information won't come easy.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Your Lying Eyes
programme.desc: Kolani's on the run, left his wife to look after four kids and left Dog holding the bag for the $10k bond. So their pursuit on this case takes them into some parts of Ohau, and the human heart, that few of us will ever see.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Crime Don't Pay
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble - or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Coop! There It Is!
programme.desc: When Jep asks Willie and the guys to help move his old chicken coop into his new house, which is under renovation, Jessica takes issue with its appearance, leading the guys to yet another project - renovating the chicken coop.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Friday Afternoon Lights
programme.desc: When Willie becomes an assistant coach on Lil' Will's struggling football team, his authority is tested when the kids challenge the adults to a scrimmage. Meanwhile, Kay brings Jep and Si to an aquarobics class at a local health club.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Master and Duck Commander
programme.desc: When Jase and the guys transform an old pontoon boat into a floating duck blind, they are faced with the impending question of whether or not it will actually float. Meanwhile, Kay's dog Bobo misbehaves.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Inlawful Entry
programme.desc: When Missy's parents visit, her father convinces Jase to take him on a quail hunt. But while their "bonding hunt" yields very few quail, it does bring them closer together as friends. Meanwhile, Willie helps John Luke start his own snow cone business.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Flock and Key
programme.desc: Si recruits his nephews to help him transport a storage container to his backyard, but things take a turn when Jep becomes locked inside the box. Meanwhile, Jase helps Mia prepare for her cheerleading competition, but the only problem is he has no idea.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Ball in the Family
programme.desc: When Willie's old rival Phillip McMillan challenges him to a game of dodgeball, Willie recruits his family members to settle a score once and for all. Meanwhile, Si thinks his cat is cheating on him with another family, so he recruits Miss Kay.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Drone Survivor
programme.desc: When Jase and Phil make a bet about whether or not human beings in a duck blind are visible from the air, Jep buys a drone copter to get a "bird's eye" view, but ends up losing it in the process.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Alan in Charge
programme.desc: Jase and the guys convince Willie to hire his older brother Alan to work at Duck Commander, but when Alan begins micromanaging everyone, they quickly change their mind. Meanwhile, the ladies take a self-defense class and use John Luke as a punching bag.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Renaissance Men
programme.desc: When the Robertsons throw a Renaissance Fair birthday party for Godwin, various family members compete in a tournament to win knighthood.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Heroes Welcome
programme.desc: In this special episode, the Duck Commander team surprises two wounded veterans with a trip to Monroe so they can be in an episode of Duck Dynasty. To show their support, the Robertson family stages a color run to bring awareness to our wounded soldiers.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Pie Hard
programme.desc: Willie and Alan agree to help Miss Kay open her own bakery, but things take a turn when Kay is asked to hand over her secret recipes. Meanwhile, the guys in the duck call room take an extended lunch break by driving to Mississippi.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Countdown To Disclosure: Evidence suggests the world's governments could be on the verge of announcing everything they know about UFOs. What will this mean for our society?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: Is biological life merely a stepping stone for a universe dominated by alien artificial intelligence?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Aliens on the Moon
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that life began on Mars and travelled to Earth. Plus, if aliens exist, what plans do they have in store for us? Experts investigate.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: UFO Portal L.A.
programme.desc: Experts investigate why so many UFO sightings take place in Los Angeles, determining that the answer may lie underwate

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed
programme.desc: This episode looks at whether fighter jets provide an adequate defense security against UFOs.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 4
programme.desc: Previously sealed documents hint at compelling new theories about extraterrestrials. Could aliens be living among us? And could former US Presidents know something we don't?

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 1 - Key planes of the Luftwaffe in WW2 included the Messerschmitt Bf 109, a versatile and widely used fighter; the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, known for its firepower and agility; and the Junkers Ju 87 Stuka, a prominent dive bomber.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - Key planes of the Luftwaffe in WW2 included the Messerschmitt Bf 109, a versatile and widely used fighter; the Focke-Wulf Fw 190, known for its firepower and agility; and the Junkers Ju 87 Stuka, a prominent dive bomber.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part.1 - Major planes of the Japanese Empire in WW2 included the Mitsubishi A6M Zero, a highly maneuverable fighter; the Nakajima Ki-43 Hayabusa, a widely used fighter; and the Mitsubishi G4M Betty, a long-range bomber utilized for strategic missions.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 2 - Major planes of the Japanese Empire in WW2 included the Mitsubishi A6M Zero, a highly maneuverable fighter; the Nakajima Ki-43 Hayabusa, another used fighter; and the Mitsubishi G4M Betty, a long-range bomber utilized for strategic missions.

programme.title: Warbirds of WWII
programme.desc: Part 1 - The Soviet air force, played a crucial role in World War II by contributing significantly to the Eastern Front's air superiority, conducting strategic bombing campaigns, and providing close air support for ground operations.

programme.title: Auschwitz Countdown To Liberation
programme.desc: An exceptional documentary that chronicles the liberation of Auschwitz, commencing on the day of liberation and backtracking in time to narrate the tragedy of the Holocaust.

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin, a battle that will determine the fate of World War II.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: The Special Operations Executive, precursor to MI6, used a foul-smelling substance called 'S liquid' to undermine German and Japanese officers.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft
programme.desc: Hurricane: Explore classic and underrated aircraft, from WWII fighters to the Screaming Eagles F4, showcasing aviation's evolving history.

programme.title: History's Greatest Aircraft: The Spitfire: A British Fighter Legend
programme.desc: Unusually, we look at the later, clipped wing version flown by Czech refugee pilots in the UK during WW2. We get close-up with a beautifully restored example, fly her and unearth long unseen test and operational footage.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Maine Event, The
programme.desc: It's week seven of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna fishing season, Gloucester captains must decide whether go where the fish are biting or take their chances fishing inshore.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Battle At Midway
programme.desc: It's week eight of the Atlantic bluefin tuna season, the midway point of fishing where crews either knuckle down and push hard, or crumble from the grind.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Wicked Pissed
programme.desc: It's week nine of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season and Captain Paul Hebert, struggles to prove his worth as a captain after catching only three tuna in the first two months of fishing.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: When Push Comes to Shove
programme.desc: It's week ten of the North Atlantic bluefin tuna season in Gloucester, Massachusetts, and, with only six weeks of fishing left, the competition is heating up.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Three’s a Charm
programme.desc: It's week 11 of the North Atlantic Bluefin tuna season, and bad luck, bait problems and big egos plague the Gloucester fleet.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 2
programme.desc: Professional scuba diver Brian Green has been found floating and not breathing, and is on a boat near the Noises, a group of islands in the Hauraki Gulf. The team has to move fast.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 3
programme.desc: On Great Mercury Island near Coromandel, a scuba diver has surfaced unconscious without a pulse. Without Rescue 1 he may soon be dead.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 4
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team respond to a call out where an elderly couple in their 60s are in a critical condition after a head on collision.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 7
programme.desc: Auckland's Westpac helicopter crew races to save a 39 year old forestry worker who has been struck on the head leaving him paralyzed from the waist down.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 8
programme.desc: The chopper crew races to save a woman with a rare disease who's in danger of suffocating from uncontrollable muscle spasms; a badly burnt toddler at Cooks Beach needs an urgent airlift to hospital.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 9
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a pilot who's trapped in the wreck of his hang glider and a diabetic bus driver is found seriously ill after four days lying on his floor.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 10
programme.desc: The Rescue 1 team are en route to the scene of a horrific accident. A pedestrian has been hit by a truck and is in a critical condition.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 11
programme.desc: A woman is badly hurt after being knocked down a bank by her pet goat, a man is found with serious injuries on a remote beach, and 11-year old girl has fallen down a bank and suffered suspected spinal damage.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 12
programme.desc: The chopper team is called out to save a motorbike racer who's crashed at 200ks per hour and a woman scalded by an exploding radiator, plus an elderly golfer in a kilt suffers a heart attack on the 18th hole.

programme.title: Chopper Squad: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 39 year old man has crashed his bike 15 kilometres south of Auckland city and an elderly man has collapsed while walking. He is unable to speak properly and is incorreherent at Waiheke Island.

programme.title: Nature Time
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: 27 Alien Encounters
programme.desc: Strange and bizarre UFO encounters abound, but recent Alien encounters by highly credible eyewitnesses are so unusual and perplexing that they challenge our understanding of physics and the Universe as we know it.

programme.title: Hopkinsville: The Alien Goblins
programme.desc: A family fights off goblin-aliens in a mysterious encounter, sparking debates and investigations. Fear drives their actions.

programme.title: UFO Hunters

programme.title: Alien Global Threat
programme.desc: New evidence reveals that world governments have had a pact with aliens for decades and that human abductions are being allowed by government and military factions.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Vehicles of all speed capabilities enter the garage, while Colin embarks on a mission to keep a milk float on the road.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin tries to help a 1978 Austin Allegro's owner with their wonky suspension, but must call in the cavalry when a piece of specialist kit packs in.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin and the team welcome a Lincoln Continental with headlight woes and a VW Golf with reliability issues.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: Colin brings a rare Ford Zephyr into the 21st Century, a VW Beach Buggy is tuned by ear, and a E-Type Jag gets super-sized air filters.

programme.title: Classic Car Garage
programme.desc: A classic car club descend on the garage as they prepare to attend an event that celebrates original and unrestored vehicles.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A volcanic island just off Taiwan containing chilling ruins from its darkest era, and a miniature railway that lies forgotten in the woods of Arkansas USA.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A fairy-tale castle that staged one of the strangest stories of the Second World War and a haunting complex on an old American Frontier.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Bizarrely-shaped huts in India, once home to global superstars, are now eerily quiet and neglected, and a shattered compound in Colombia linked to a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The home of an African dictator and a sporting hero, the stage for civil rights revolution, and the facility that held apartheid's greatest critic.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: The historic Royal Albert Hall is in need of urgent repairs, but it's a difficult job requiring careful work. A specialist team is brought in to restore the building before its grand reopening.

programme.title: Great British Landmark Fixers
programme.desc: Southend Pier, built in 1888, has suffered over a century of salt water corrosion. To stop it from potentially collapsing into the sea, a team of specialists are on hand to repair this Victorian marvel.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The team treat a lorry driver trapped behind his twisted steering wheel and help is urgently required for a 12-year-old who appears to be drunk after drinking an unknown substance.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The discovery of underwear on a canal bank sparks a risky missing persons search and a police incident ends in a fleeing car passenger jumping over a wall and breaking his leg.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A major fire breaks out in a haulage depot in Brighouse and a serious accident at an illegal off-road biking site leads to a rider needing urgent hospital treatment.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: A skier falls over on a steep slope and suffers a suspected brain injury in Wakefield and a DIY enthusiast's attempts to fix the heating in his chilly home end in disaster.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The start of the new school term leads of a spate of stabbing's and a forester is badly injured in an accident involving a chainsaw deep in woods near Keighley.

programme.title: 999: Rescue Squad
programme.desc: The work of NHS emergency response teams. Staff are scrambled to a block of flats after an explosion causes multiple casualties and a driver is trapped after his lorry hits a tree.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: The Alpha Recovery team face a challenge as a double decker bus has rolled onto its side,

programme.desc: A 26-ton truck breaks down beside the London Eye.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: A bin lorry has come off a country lane, its wheels slipping in mud.

programme.title: Arthur: What Is That Thing?/Buster's Best Behavior
programme.desc: Arthur and friends are all faced with seemingly impossible tasks, from fixing a model biplane to babysitting D.W. And, Buster knows he's fun, but he's beginning to feel like he's not particularly good at anything.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur and The Crunch Cereal Contest/D.W. Flips
programme.desc: A year's supply of Crunch Cereal is in store for the person who can write the new Crunch Cereal jingle, and Arthur is sure he can do it. Next, how hard can it be to do a cartwheel on a balance beam? D.W. is about to find out.

programme.title: Arthur: Flippity Francine/Muffy Takes the Wheel
programme.desc: When Muffy posts a goofy video of Francine on the Muffington Post, Francine worries she will become the laughing stock of the entire school. And it's the 1st Annual Lakewood Derby and Muffy's revved up!

programme.title: Arthur: Francine's Split Decision/Muffy Goes Metropolitan
programme.desc: Lakewood Elementary is sure to win the big bowling tournament on Saturday, but Francine's cousin is having his Bar Mitzvah at the same time! Muffy happily accepts an invitation to spend the weekend in the bustling Crown City.

programme.title: Arthur: Whip. Mix. Blend./Staycation
programme.desc: When Rattles's mom starts dating Archie Vanderloo, Rattles finds himself spending time with his twins, but they don’t have anything in common. Arthur offers to babysit so that his parents can enjoy some peace and quiet in the backyard.

programme.title: Arthur: Best Wishes/The Tardy Tumbler
programme.desc: After George has a lucky streak, his friends pressure him to wish for a snow day. Can George deliver? Prunella's excited about making the gymnastics team, until she realizes practice starts at 6am! Will she practice or snooze?

programme.title: Arthur: Locked In The Library!/Arthur Accused!
programme.desc: Arthur and Francine are fighting. But when they get locked inside the library they either have to make up or prepare for a long evening. And when Buster opens his detective agency, he has no idea his first job will involve Arthur.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When she finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, Baby Bop wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: That Makes Me Mad!
programme.desc: Barney helps his young friends find good ways to express and deal with angry emotions.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: At Home in the Park

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop has trouble following the rules and taking turns while playing games. BJ hurts his toe while pretending to be Captain Pickles.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Look What I Can Do
